name: From Zurich: Bus tour to Lucerne with Sapphire Yacht Cruise
description: Discover From Zurich: Bus tour to Lucerne with Sapphire Yacht Cruise in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Zurich: Bus tour to Lucerne with Sapphire Yacht Cruise in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Lucerne: River, historic buildings and Sapphire Yacht Cruise in the city of Lucerne in summer.

Lucerne: Historic Chapel Bridge and Water Tower at Lake Lucerne with blooming plants.
Lucerne: breathtaking view of the city and the Saphir Yacht Cruise on the water
Lucerne: picturesque lake with mountains in the background, ideal for boat trips and nature experiences.
Lucerne: View of the city by the water with Saphir Yacht Cruise, great architecture and clear view.
Lucerne: Experience the Saphir Yacht with stunning lake views and green mountains in summer.
